risk_tiers.label: Low
risk_tiers.message: No bloom signal detected. Standard precautions apply.

risk_tiers.label: Moderate
risk_tiers.message: Low-level bloom signal present. Sensitive individuals should exercise caution.

risk_tiers.label: High
risk_tiers.message: Active bloom signal. Avoid water contact. Keep pets away.

risk_tiers.label: Very High
risk_tiers.message: Dense bloom present. Do not enter the water.

risk_tiers.label: Danger
risk_tiers.message: Severe bloom. Shoreline contact may be harmful. Follow posted advisories.
